reviews.comment:
Un lugar enorme,  pocos empleados y ni siquiera tiene venta de kiosco y cafetería.  Los baños estaban limpios al menos.

(Translated by Google)
A huge place, few employees, and it doesn't even have a kiosk or coffee shop. At least the bathrooms were clean.

reviews.comment:
Lleve mi auto a cambiar aceite y filtros , me atendieron muy bien y despejaron todas mis dudas con un escaneo del auto, me atendió un muchacho muy amable creo que se llama Alejandro ,LO RECOMIENDO!!!

(Translated by Google)
I took my car in for an oil and filter change. They treated me very well and answered all my questions with a car scan. A very friendly young man, I think his name was Alejandro, helped me. I highly recommend them!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxLXI3eHpBRRAB
